name: Lamb Chops with Gorgonzola
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces Gorgonzola (or any fine blue vein cheese of your choice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss the lamb chops with salt, pepper, and olive oil.
2. Wrap exposed bones in aluminum foil so they do not burn.
3. Grill the lamb chops to your desired temperature.
4. For the sauce: In a sauce pot, add white wine and reduce by half.
5. Add heavy cream and reduce on medium heat until thickened.
6. Whisk in cheese and butter until incorporated. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
This is served with Fresh Horseradish Mashed Potatoes (recipe listed under that title).
